about.title: What is ResumeAIPro?
about.body: ResumeAIPro is a dedicated AI resume generator and AI cover letter maker built solely for job hunters worldwide. Generic template resumes get filtered out by ATS systems and ignored by recruiters every day. Our tool builds fully personalized resume bullet points and refined cover letters that align perfectly with your unique career history and the exact requirements of your desired roles.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChoose.item1: Proven trust: 50,000+ job seekers rely on our AI resume generator, with a 4.9/5 user satisfaction score
whyChoose.item2: Blazing-fast speed: Custom ATS-friendly resume and cover letter drafts finish generating in under 10 seconds
whyChoose.item3: Zero restrictive templates: Every sentence is original, written specifically around your personal experience instead of copy-paste frameworks
whyChoose.item4: Recruiter & ATS optimized: All output follows hiring manager standards and passes automated resume screening software

howItWorks.title: How It Works in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1: Paste your full work history, hard/soft skills, education and core experience into the main input field
howItWorks.step2: (Optional) Insert the target job posting text to let our AI cover letter maker tailor content to match role expectations
howItWorks.step3: Tap the generate button, review your polished AI resume and cover letter, then copy text or download files for immediate job applications

gallery.title: See the Magic in Action
gallery.body: Browse real before-and-after comparisons of generic template resumes transformed into high-converting ATS-friendly resumes built by our AI resume generator. View sample tailored cover letters, read success testimonials from 50K+ hired users, and explore 5-star user reviews highlighting faster interview callbacks and smoother job applications powered by ResumeAIPro.

gallery.coverSampleLabel: AI Cover Letter Maker — Sample Opening
gallery.coverSampleText:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm excited to apply for the Product Manager role at your company. With 6 years leading B2B SaaS roadmaps and a track record of launching features that increased retention by 22%, I can help your team ship customer-backed products faster.
